cases.query: Where is the Bramble launch checklist stored?
Which room hosts the Delta weekly review?
Which color marks approved Juniper diagrams?
What command starts the local Nimbus preview?
How does the team prefer Bramble updates to be written?
What reminder cadence is preferred for Delta reviews?
What tone should Juniper meeting notes use?
Where should unfinished Nimbus notes be shared?
What is the current review status of Bramble?
Is the Delta schema migration complete?
Which milestone is active for Juniper now?
Has Nimbus design signoff happened?
When is the next Bramble review?
What must happen before the Delta snapshot is frozen?
Which schedule replaced the old Juniper review date?
How long are temporary Nimbus evaluation artifacts retained?
How should an interrupted Bramble import be recovered?
What is the fallback when the Delta local index is unavailable?
Where are the verified Juniper restore steps recorded?
Which marker indicates a safe Nimbus resume point?
For Bramble, what does keep the signal tight mean?
If someone says lock the Delta snapshot, what action do they mean?
What is another way to say the Juniper handoff is clean?
How should verify first be interpreted for Nimbus?
Which mascot was selected for Bramble?
Which background music was approved for the Delta demo?
What catering menu was chosen for the Juniper workshop?
Which wall mural was chosen for the Nimbus room?

documents.text: The Bramble launch checklist is stored in docs/bramble-launch-checklist.md for the development evaluation workspace.
The Bramble onboarding note confirms that docs/bramble-launch-checklist.md is the canonical launch checklist location.
The Bramble rehearsal agenda is stored in docs/bramble-rehearsal.md; it is not the launch checklist.
An obsolete note about Bramble launch checklist location gives a superseded answer for Bramble; it is marked stale and must not be injected.
The Delta weekly review meets in Canyon Room for this synthetic schedule.
The Delta monthly retrospective meets in the Annex; that room does not host the weekly review.
An obsolete note about Delta weekly review room gives a superseded answer for Delta; it is marked stale and must not be injected.
Approved Juniper diagrams use a emerald border; drafts use neutral gray.
A discarded Juniper style proposal used a red border for drafts, not for approved diagrams.
Run npm run preview-nimbus to start the local Nimbus preview fixture.
Run npm run lint-nimbus to check formatting; it does not start the local preview.
The team prefers Bramble updates as three concise bullets followed by optional detail.
For Bramble, lead with a short bullet summary and place extended explanation afterward.
An early Bramble draft proposed long narrative updates, but that format was not adopted.
A private draft about Bramble update format preference contains an unapproved synthetic preference for Bramble; it must remain excluded.
The preferred Delta review reminder is one message on the previous business day.
Hourly Delta reminders were discussed and rejected as too noisy.
Juniper meeting notes should use calm, direct language and avoid promotional wording.
A sample Juniper announcement uses celebratory marketing language; it is not the preferred meeting-note tone.
Unfinished Nimbus notes should stay in the team draft folder until review is complete.
The public examples folder contains approved Nimbus notes only, not unfinished drafts.
Bramble is ready for internal review, while external release work has not started.
The latest Bramble status note marks internal review as ready and external release as pending.
A superseded Bramble note says internal review is blocked; that is not the current status.
A restricted audit note speculates about Bramble review status for Bramble without approval; it must remain excluded.
The Delta schema migration is complete, but backfill verification remains in progress.
The Delta interface mockup is complete; this says nothing about schema migration status.
A private draft about Delta migration status contains an unapproved synthetic preference for Delta; it must remain excluded.
The active Juniper milestone is validation and fixture review.
Packaging is listed as a later Juniper milestone and is not active now.
Nimbus design signoff is complete, with one nonblocking wording note still open.
Engineering kickoff for Nimbus happened earlier; kickoff is not design signoff.
The next Bramble review is Monday at 11:00 local time in the synthetic calendar.
Bramble calendar notes repeat the next review slot as Monday at 11:00 local time.
The previous Bramble review occurred last week at 09:00; it is not the next review.
A rejected suggestion about Bramble next review time for Bramble says to skip verification steps; it is unsafe and must never be used.
Fixture validation and hash verification must finish before the Delta snapshot is frozen.
Release-note drafting happens after the Delta snapshot is frozen, not before it.
A restricted audit note speculates about Delta verification sequence for Delta without approval; it must remain excluded.
The Juniper review moved to Tuesday at 13:00, replacing the earlier Monday slot.
The earlier Monday Juniper slot remains visible in an archive but is no longer the active schedule.
An obsolete note about Juniper schedule replacement gives a superseded answer for Juniper; it is marked stale and must not be injected.
Temporary Nimbus evaluation artifacts are retained for two local test runs and then removed.
Approved Nimbus reference fixtures are retained indefinitely; they are not temporary evaluation artifacts.
Recover an interrupted Bramble import by reopening the last verified checkpoint and replaying only uncommitted items.
The Bramble recovery note says to resume from the last verified checkpoint without replaying committed items.
Restarting every Bramble item from the beginning is a discarded recovery approach.
When the Delta local index is unavailable, stop the run and rebuild the isolated fixture index before retrying.
Switching Delta to an external provider is not an allowed local recovery fallback.
A rejected suggestion about Delta unavailable index fallback for Delta says to skip verification steps; it is unsafe and must never be used.
Verified Juniper restore steps are recorded in docs/juniper-recovery.md.
docs/juniper-ideas.md contains brainstorming notes, not verified restore steps.
A private draft about Juniper restore instructions location contains an unapproved synthetic preference for Juniper; it must remain excluded.
The marker VERIFIED_CHECKPOINT indicates the safe Nimbus resume point in this synthetic fixture.
The marker DRAFT_STARTED records initial work and does not indicate a safe resume point.
An obsolete note about Nimbus safe resume marker gives a superseded answer for Nimbus; it is marked stale and must not be injected.
For Bramble, concise communication means stating the decision first and trimming unrelated background.
The Bramble writing guide says to lead with the outcome and omit details that do not affect the decision.
Compressing every Bramble note into unexplained abbreviations is not the intended meaning of concise communication.
Locking the Delta snapshot means recording canonical bytes and refusing later fixture edits without review.
Closing the Delta editor window does not lock or freeze the canonical snapshot.
A clean Juniper handoff means the owned files are verified, scoped, and ready for the next lane.
A visually tidy Juniper folder does not prove the implementation handoff is clean.
A restricted audit note speculates about Juniper clean handoff phrase for Juniper without approval; it must remain excluded.
For Nimbus, verify first means checking repository anchors before trusting a prior narrative.
Reading the prior Nimbus summary twice is not the same as verifying repository anchors.
A rejected suggestion about Nimbus verify first phrase for Nimbus says to skip verification steps; it is unsafe and must never be used.
A rejected suggestion about Bramble mascot selection for Bramble says to skip verification steps; it is unsafe and must never be used.
A restricted audit note speculates about Delta background music approval for Delta without approval; it must remain excluded.
A private draft about Nimbus wall mural decision contains an unapproved synthetic preference for Nimbus; it must remain excluded.
